parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Substring to match against time entry descriptions (case-insensitive)

get.summary: Get onboarding status for the current user

timezone.description: IANA timezone name detected from the client's browser (e.g. Asia/Shanghai). Validated server-side; invalid values are rejected with 400.

site_url.description: Public URL of this OpenToggl instance, configured by the instance admin.

invite_token.description: Plaintext invite token for members still in the invited state. Null once the invite is accepted or revoked.

invite_token_expires_at.description: Expiry timestamp for the active invite token, if any.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name detected from the client's browser.
